'''Lythos Nine''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Lythos system/Legends|Lythos system]], affiliated with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''

==Sources==
